name: More Than Friends
overview:
Due to a misunderstanding, Lee Soo and Kyung Woo Yeon have held a crush on each other for over 10 years.

Lee Soo works as a photographer and he is attractive. He is also mistaken for a model many times.  Kyung Woo Yeon works as a calligrapher. She has had a crush on Lee Soo for the past 10 years, since she was 18 years old.

trailers.title: MORE THAN FRIENDS Trailer #1 | Ong Seong Wu, Shin Ye Eun | Coming to Viu
